log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Fairy — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Fairy — Bardic Musician.
→ Fairy — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 20] FAIL! 20 necrotic damage. HP: 47/67
--- Fairy — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Fairy — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:12+12=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 fire damage. Fairy — Bardic Musician HP: 38/67
--- Fairy — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Fairy — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:20+12=32 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 30 fire damage. Fairy — Bardic Musician HP: 8/67
--- Fairy — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Fairy — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Fairy — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:11+12=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 7 fire damage. Fairy — Bardic Musician HP: 1/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
--- Fairy — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Fairy — Bardic Musician.
→ Fairy — Bardic Musician healed for 8 HP. HP: 9/67
=== ROUND 6 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Fairy — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:16+12=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 fire damage. Fairy — Bardic Musician HP: -8/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 6 rounds ===
